content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium hero entrance motion, BlurText headline, scroll reveal, fading video loop, cinematic landing page motion, premium CTA interaction
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

Visual traits:
- slow subtle staggered motion
- blur-to-sharp text reveal
- opacity and y-axis entrance
- manual video fade loop
- quiet hover feedback
- readability-preserving animation

Use when:
- premium hero entrance motion
- BlurText headline
- scroll reveal
- fading video loop
- cinematic landing page motion
- premium CTA interaction

Avoid when:
- fast bouncing motion
- excessive spinning
- neon flashing
- every element moving at once
- looping chart animation after values settle
- motion that hurts readability

AI summary: Premium motion rules: use slow staggered blur/y/opacity entrances, BlurText word reveal, scroll reveal once, restrained hover scale, and manual fading video loops for hard-cut media. Avoid bouncing, flashing, or animating everything at once.

content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium hero entrance motion, BlurText headline, scroll reveal, fading video loop, cinematic landing page motion, premium CTA interaction
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Use motion to reveal hierarchy, not to decorate every element.
- Sequence hero elements: badge, heading, subheading, CTA, then stats/partners.
- Use scroll reveal once for section entrances.
- Let data/chart motion settle to readable static values.
- Reduce parallax and heavy motion on mobile.

AI summary: Premium motion rules: use slow staggered blur/y/opacity entrances, BlurText word reveal, scroll reveal once, restrained hover scale, and manual fading video loops for hard-cut media. Avoid bouncing, flashing, or animating everything at once.

- hover scale 1.03

AI summary: Premium motion rules: use slow staggered blur/y/opacity entrances, BlurText word reveal, scroll reveal once, restrained hover scale, and manual fading video loops for hard-cut media. Avoid bouncing, flashing, or animating everything at once.

content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium hero entrance motion, BlurText headline, scroll reveal, fading video loop, cinematic landing page motion, premium CTA interaction
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
- Do not animate every element at once.
- Avoid fast bouncing, spinning, neon flashing, or motion that harms readability.
- Do not rely on animation as the only way to communicate state or data.
- Keep text readable during blur transitions.

AI summary: Premium motion rules: use slow staggered blur/y/opacity entrances, BlurText word reveal, scroll reveal once, restrained hover scale, and manual fading video loops for hard-cut media. Avoid bouncing, flashing, or animating everything at once.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: premium hero entrance motion, BlurText headline, scroll reveal, fading video loop, cinematic landing page motion, premium CTA interaction
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Default entrance: opacity 0, y 20, filter blur(10px) to opacity 1, y 0, filter blur(0px).
- Use duration 0.6s to 1.2s and easeOut or power3.out.
- Hero timing: badge 0.3-0.4s, heading 0.4-0.6s, subheading 0.8s, CTA 1.0-1.1s, stats 1.2-1.4s.
- BlurText: split by words; each word enters from blur(10px), opacity 0, y 50; middle blur(5px), opacity 0.5, y -5; final blur(0), opacity 1, y 0.
- Manual video loop: fade in 0.5s, fade out 0.5s before end, opacity 0 on ended, wait 100ms, reset currentTime, play, fade to 1.
- Use whileInView, viewport once, opacity 0 to 1, y 30 to 0, duration 0.8s to 1s for scroll reveal.

AI summary: Premium motion rules: use slow staggered blur/y/opacity entrances, BlurText word reveal, scroll reveal once, restrained hover scale, and manual fading video loops for hard-cut media. Avoid bouncing, flashing, or animating everything at once.
